title: BGS Diy 50796 | Flat Milling Drill Set | 10 - 25 mm | 6 pcs.
features: for drilling shallow holes with different diameters in soft and medium hard wood | also suitable as an accessory for electricians and other installers for drilling holes in wood for cables, pipes and other installations
with center point for fixing the drill on the workpiece | on both sides with angled sharp cutting edges for quick penetration into the wood
enables clean drilling | specially hardened for long service life | embossed size information on the drill bits
hexagonal shaft for use with three-jaw drill chucks | practical set composition with different diameters 10, 12, 16, 18, 20 and 25 mm
description: From the manufacturer BGS About the company BGS technic KG, a traditional, owner-run family company, has been offering an ever-expanding selection of hand tools and special automotive tools for over 45 years. Products Tool Trolley Socket Set and Tool Case Tumblers Tipped and Tipped Cups Ratchet, Extensions, Adapters & Accessories Torque Tools Hand Tools High Voltage Tools / Insulated Tools Pneumatic Tools Power/Battery Tools Motorcycle Special Tools Protection at Work
